title: cremanthodium farreri
intro: Cremanthodium farreri, also known as the yellow mountain daisy or golden daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium farreri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants in traditional Tibetan medicine.
